protein_name: Calretinin is a calcium-binding protein which is abundant in auditory neurons. Belongs to the calbindin family. Brain. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: cuticular plate; cytosol; dendriole; dendrite; gap junction; nucleus; parallel fiber to Purkinje cell synapse; stereocilium; synapse; terminal bouton
raw_fields.Molecular Function: calcium ion binding; calcium ion binding involved in regulation of presynaptic cytosolic calcium ion concentration; metal ion binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: intracellular calcium ion homeostasis; regulation of presynaptic cytosolic calcium ion concentration; regulation of synaptic plasticity; synaptic signaling
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: 29 kDa calbindin; CAB29; CAL2; CALB2; calbindin 2; calbindin 2, (29kD, calretinin); calbindin D29K; Calretinin; CR; testicular secretory protein Li 8
